abilities.name: Chlorokinesis
abilities.details: Velerias's basic attack weaves her scepter to send out a small orb of Healing Energy that flies to the target.[n]If the target is an ally (Velerias can basic attack allied units), the energy orb [bf]heals[/] them (scaling with [hp]maximum health[/]).[n]If the target is an enemy, the energy orb deals bonus [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [hp]maximum health[/]) and briefly [db]reveals[/] them.

abilities.name: Root Bind
abilities.details: Velerias thrusts her scepter forward, sending a line of sharp wooden briars through the earth, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [hp]maximum health[/]) to the first enemy hit and [db]root[/] the target for a short duration.[n]If Velerias is standing on a Verdant Soil, the root duration is [db]increased[/].

abilities.name: Verdant Soil
abilities.details: Velerias creates a small circle of Verdant Soil at her location for a short duration.[n]Allies standing on this soil are [bf]healed[/] (scaling with [hp]maximum health[/]) every second.

abilities.name: Thorn Embrace
abilities.details: Velerias targets an enemy hero, tethering them to her scepter with a spectral vine for a few seconds.[n]While tethered, the enemy deals [bf]reduced damage[/] to Velerias while she continuously drains the target's [hp]health[/] (scaling with [hp]maximum health[/]).

abilities.name: Mycelial Hymm
abilities.details: Velerias connects to the forest's root system and becomes untargetable for a few seconds.[n]During this time, a forest field quickly expands from her location. Enemies caught in the field are [db]slowed[/] and will fall asleep if they remain in the field for 2 seconds.[n]The next instance of non-persistent damage that a sleeping target takes from a hero consumes the debuff to deal additional [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [hp]maximum health[/]).
